steps_raw.instruction: Sample preparation
Wash cells with 0.9% NaCl.
Sample preparation - biological fluids and tissue
Collect the supernatant, flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C .
Centrifuge lysate at 20000 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes .
Collect lysate with a cell scraper and incubate On ice for 00:30:00 .
Add 150 µL of ice-cold 6% TCA to extract metabolites.
Add 25 µL of isobutyl chloroformate, incubate at 35 °C for 00:30:00 .
Add 900 µL of sodium carbonate buffer to 100 µL of supernatant.
Derivatization
LC-MS analysis
Collect 900 µL of the upper phase, dry under vacuum, and dissolve in 125 µL of 50% acetonitrile in water with 0.1% formic acid.
Add 1 mL of diethyl ether, vortex, and incubate for 00:15:00 at 25 °C .
Transfer 800 µL of the reaction mixture to a 2 mL Eppendorf tube.
Apply a gradient: - 0–2 min: 20% B - 2–10 min: Linear increase to 85% B - 10–17 min: Hold at 85% B - 18 min: Return to 20% B
Use solvent A (H 2 O with 0.2% acetic acid) and solvent B (acetonitrile with 0.2% acetic acid).
Load 10 µL onto the LC system with an ACQUITY UPLC HSS C18 column.
Set mass spectrometer to full scan (70–750 m/z), positive mode.
Maintain flow rate at 250 μL/min and column temperature at 30 °C .
Transfer to an MS vial.
Data analysis
Maintain column temperature at 25 °C .

Apply a gradient: - 0–0.67 min: 5% B, flow rate 1.8 mL/min to waste - 0.67–1 min: 5–35% B - 1–1.1 min: Flow reduced to 0.3 mL/min, increase to 36% B - 1.1–3 min: Linear increase to 85% B, hold until 4.7 min - 4.7–4.73 min: Redirect flow to waste, decrease flow to 1.8 mL/min - 4.73–4.86 min: Decrease to 5% B, equilibrate
Load 50 µL onto the LC system with a VanGuard Pre-column.
LC-MS analysis
Transfer to an MS vial.
Incubate at 35 °C for 00:30:00 .
Add 360 µL of sodium carbonate buffer and 10 µL of isobutyl chloroformate.
Derivatization
Centrifuge and collect 40 µL of supernatant for derivatization.

Mix 50 µL of ACM or plasma with 50 µL of ice-cold TCA extraction buffer containing labeled internal standards. Internal standards: 13 C 5 ornithine (Cat# CLM-4724-H-PK), 13 C 4 putrescine (Cat# CLM-6574-PK), 13 C 4 spermidine (Cat# CLM-9435-PK) and D 8 spermine (Cat# DLM-9262-PK) from Cambridge Isotope Laboratories, Inc.
Integrate peak areas using El-Maven (Elucidata).
Data analysis
Integrate peak areas using El-Maven (Elucidata).

For cerebrospinal fluid (CSF), combine each sample with an equal volume of ice-cold 6% TCA extraction buffer containing labeled internal standards. Due to the limited volume obtained per animal, a subset of CSF samples may need to be pooled prior to extraction to ensure sufficient material for LC-MS/MS analysis. Pool samples across animals of the same genotype and sex. Pooled samples are processed identically to individual samples. In figures, represent individual samples as filled symbols and pooled samples as open symbols.
For cortical brain tissue (15–30 mg), add 250 µL of ice-cold TCA extraction buffer containing labeled internal standards and homogenize samples in Ribolyser tubes to ensure thorough extraction.
